zh.Bideford, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文比德福德
zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Grenville III於大約1140年出生在英國時，他的父親Richard de Grenville II32歲，母親Lady Adeline De Beaumont35歲。他於1172年之前與Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1204年在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Grenville III于大约1140年出生在英国时，他的父亲Richard de Grenville II32岁，母亲Lady Adeline De Beaumont35岁。他于1172年之前与Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1204年在英国英格兰戴文比德福德享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Grenville III was born about 1140, in England, his father, Richard de Grenville II, was 32 and his mother, Lady Adeline De Beaumont, was 35. He married Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton before 1172, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1204, in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Grenville III est né environ 1140, à Angleterre, son père, Richard de Grenville II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Adeline De Beaumont, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton avant 1172, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1204, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Grenville III um 1140 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Grenville II 32 und seine Mutter Lady Adeline De Beaumont 35. Er hat vor 1172 in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1204 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Grenville III è nato il circa 1140 nel England, il suo padre, Richard de Grenville II, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Adeline De Beaumont, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton prima del 1172, nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1204, nel Bideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Grenville IIIが約1140年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard de Grenville IIは32歳，母Lady Adeline De Beaumontは35歳であった。1172年以前にイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンでBaroness Adeline Gundrada de Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1204年にイギリスイギリスデボンビデフォードで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Grenville III(이)가 대략 1140년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Grenville II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Adeline De Beaumont(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1172년 이전 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에서 Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1204년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Grenville III nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Grenville II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Adeline De Beaumont, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton antes 1172, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1204, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Grenville III родился около 1140 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Grenville II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Adeline De Beaumont, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton перед 1172 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1204 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Grenville III nació aproximadamente 1140, en Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Grenville II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Adeline De Beaumont, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Baroness Adeline Gundrada de Middleton antes de 1172, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1204, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
